name: rails-37signals-workflows
description: Workflow-level Rails skills for implementing, refactoring, and reviewing features with 37signals-style conventions.

interface.shortDescription: End-to-end Rails implementation, refactor, and review workflows.
interface.longDescription: Higher-level Rails workflow skills that orchestrate end-to-end feature work, refactors, and reviews using 37signals-style conventions.
defaultPrompt: Implement this Rails feature with 37signals conventions.
Refactor this Rails code while preserving behavior.
Review this Rails change for 37signals-style tradeoffs.
